creator: kazemzad@usc.edu
text:
This isn't really a solution to the bug per se, but a work-around I
found was to disable usb keyboard in my bios (I'm using a jetway
a210gdms mobo).  This gets me passed the initial boot and the keyboard
actually works in the installer.  I haven't gone thru w/ the
installer, but if you'd like a follow up, let me know.
Abe
